product_name: Dragon Ball Evolve - Dragon Ball Super - Jiren Full Power Final Form 5" Action Figure

bullets: Dragon Ball Evolve delivers a high-quality figure created to look exactly like your favorite character from the popular anime series, Dragon Ball Super
Each character in the Evolve series is approximately 5 inches tall with 27 points of articulation
Dragon Ball Super Evolve figures are so authentic and realistic you can recreate the epic battles and favorite moments from the anime
Look for more characters from the Evolve series and grow your collection
content.description: Get transported to the fierce battles and imaginative worlds of Dragon Ball with these super exciting Dragon Ball Evolve figures. These 5-inch favorite are expertly crafted and intricately detailed with over 16 points of articulation. So authentic and realistic you may think they’re the real thing.   Jiren, the pride of Universe 11, is a participant in the Tournament of Power and Goku’s toughest battle. His power exceeds that of a destroyer and is one of the strongest mortals in the multiverse. Jiren is a man devoted to justice and his convictions.

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
